title: Speed-to-value messaging lands in 62% of discovery calls
anchor: April Gong sample shows 17 of 27 calls restating the frame, with platform-consolidation at 19%.
connect: Mid-market closes at 31% with the same hierarchy; enterprise at 13%.
body: April Gong sample shows 17 of 27 calls restating the frame, with platform-consolidation at 19%. Mid-market closes at 31% with the same hierarchy; enterprise at 13%.
trace: Message resonance tracking from Gong transcript analysis showing speed-to-value frame adoption in field conversations.

title: ICP match rate climbs to 78% on new logos
anchor: Q2 runs at 28 of 36 new wins fitting the profile, up from 23 of 36 in Q1.
connect: ICP-aligned deals close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins.
body: Q2 runs at 28 of 36 new wins fitting the profile, up from 23 of 36 in Q1. ICP-aligned deals close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins.
trace: ICP validation showing improved targeting precision and the velocity benefit of profile alignment.

title: Beacon Systems win rate jumps to 64% head-to-head
anchor: Q2 competitive record shows 14-8 record across 22 head-to-head deals.
body: Q2 competitive record shows 14-8 record across 22 head-to-head deals. Prior four-quarter average ran at 28%.
trace: Significant competitive improvement against primary competitor, tracking head-to-head deal outcomes.

title: Battlecard utilization reaches 61% on competitive deals
anchor: Q2 shows 38 opens across 62 Beacon Systems opportunities.
body: Q2 shows 38 opens across 62 Beacon Systems opportunities. Q1 utilization sat at 22%.
trace: Sales enablement adoption tracking showing field team engagement with competitive resources.

title: Northstar win rate lifts to 51% post-objection update
anchor: April 8 battlecard revision shows head-to-head improvement from 42% before the update.
connect: Northstar mentions in Gong calls drop 22% in the four weeks after.
body: April 8 battlecard revision shows head-to-head improvement from 42% before the update. Northstar mentions in Gong calls drop 22% in the four weeks after.
trace: Competitive enablement effectiveness tracking objection-handling section impact on deal outcomes.

title: Verge IO presence doubles in competitive landscape
anchor: Q2 shows 18 of 75 competitive opportunities, up from 11% in Q1.
body: Q2 shows 18 of 75 competitive opportunities, up from 11% in Q1. Series B of $40M closed March 14.
trace: Emerging competitor tracking showing market presence expansion following funding event.

title: Close reason capture reaches 92% across deals
anchor: Q2 outcome data shows 47 of 51 closed deals with structured reasons in CRM.
body: Q2 outcome data shows 47 of 51 closed deals with structured reasons in CRM. Q1 capture rate sat at 71%.
trace: Win/loss data quality improvement tracking CRM hygiene for competitive intelligence.

title: CRM Sync launch generates $420K pipeline in three weeks
anchor: April 8 launch produces 14 new opportunities since ship date.
connect: October launch first-three-week pipeline sat at $310K.
body: April 8 launch produces 14 new opportunities since ship date. October launch first-three-week pipeline sat at $310K.
trace: Product launch effectiveness tracking showing pipeline generation velocity comparison.

title: Launch asset adoption hits 71% in first two weeks
anchor: 27 of 38 reps opened battlecard or one-pager for CRM Sync launch.
body: 27 of 38 reps opened battlecard or one-pager for CRM Sync launch. Prior launch adoption reached 42%.
trace: Sales enablement adoption tracking for product launch materials showing field engagement improvement.

title: Asset-opening reps generate 2.4x launch pipeline
anchor: Pipeline differential tracks reps who engaged launch materials versus those who did not.
connect: 71% of the field opened battlecard or one-pager in first 14 days.
body: Pipeline differential tracks reps who engaged launch materials versus those who did not. 71% of the field opened battlecard or one-pager in first 14 days.
trace: Launch enablement ROI measurement showing correlation between asset usage and pipeline creation.

title: Forecast Pro launch readiness clears 10 days early
anchor: May 15 ship date carries all three items signed off May 5: positioning brief, battlecard, sales briefing.
connect: Prior launch positioning brief signed off 2 days before ship.
body: May 15 ship date carries all three items signed off May 5: positioning brief, battlecard, sales briefing. Prior launch positioning brief signed off 2 days before ship.
trace: Launch preparation timing showing improved cross-functional coordination against ship dates.

title: Enterprise inbound converts 8 points higher with positioning hook

connect: Inbound-to-meeting conversion lifts across the same period.
body: Q2 enterprise inbound pipeline sits at $290K with the new messaging frame. Inbound-to-meeting conversion lifts across the same period.
trace: Message effectiveness measurement showing enterprise segment response to new positioning framework.

title: Launch-attributed pipeline reaches 18% of Q2 net new
anchor: $620K of total $3.4M net new pipeline traces to launch activity.
connect: CRM Sync launch contributed $420K in its first three weeks.
body: $620K of total $3.4M net new pipeline traces to launch activity. CRM Sync launch contributed $420K in its first three weeks.
trace: Launch pipeline attribution showing product launch contribution to total quarterly pipeline generation.

title: Media pickup rate climbs to 42% on latest announcement

connect: Prior launch pickup rate ran at 28%.
body: April 8 launch earned coverage from 22 of 53 outreached publications. Prior launch pickup rate ran at 28%.

title: Launch-week pipeline runs 2x prior announcement velocity

connect: Media pickup climbed from 28% to 42% across the two launches.
body: First 7 days of April 8 launch pipeline doubles October launch same-window performance. Media pickup climbed from 28% to 42% across the two launches.

title: Customer exit themes surface in 31% of Beacon competitive deals

body: Implementation timeline and integration breadth appear across competitive conversations. 14 April exit interviews produced 6 themes, with 2 feeding positioning work.

body: Competitive presence clusters where Atlas has strongest ICP alignment. Overall Verge share climbed from 11% to 24% of competitive opportunities in Q2.
